productDisplayName: Allen Solly Men Leather Black Wallet
description: Style Noteallen solly was formed in 1744 in Nottingham, England. Their wallets are creatively engineered to cater to the urban male. Make a style statement effortlessly with this simply silhouetted leather wallet. With lots of space for all your monetary essentials and classy stitch detailing, this wallet in black makes a fabulous combination of style and practicality.Product DetailsHas two main compartmentsSix credit card slots with two slip pocketsBrand name appliquéd on the frontMaterial and CareLeatherWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustSize10.5 cm x 9 cm
